name: Airbnb Property Search Workflow
summary: Run a scripted Airbnb property search in San Francisco and extract listings + first-property details.
description: Open Airbnb in a fresh tab, run a hard-coded San Francisco search (2 adults + 1 child, $100-$300/night, Entire place, check-in 7 days out for 3 nights), extract the first 5 result listings, then open the first listing and extract property details + availability calendar metadata. Read-only browser navigation; no parameters today. Use as a smoke / demo of Airbnb DOM extraction. Do not use for parameterized search — selectors and filters are pinned in-script.

inputs.script: (async()=>{const sleep=(ms)=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const input=document.querySelector("[data-testid='structured-search-input-field-query']");if(input){try{const proto=Object.getPrototypeOf(input);const desc=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(proto,'value');if(desc&&desc.set){desc.set.call(input,'San Francisco');}else{input.value='San Francisco';}input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));input.focus();}catch(_e){}}const listboxSels=["[role='listbox']","[data-testid='bigsearch-query-location-listbox']","#bigsearch-query-location-listbox","[data-testid^='bigsearch-query-location-listbox']"];let listbox=null;for(let i=0;i<16;i++){for(const s of listboxSels){const els=document.querySelectorAll(s);for(const el of els){if(el&&el.offsetParent!==null){listbox=el;break;}}if(listbox)break;}if(listbox)break;await sleep(400);}if(!listbox)return{error:'listbox_not_visible'};const optSels=["[data-testid='option-0']","[data-testid^='bigsearch-query-location-listbox-item-']","[role='option']","li[role='option']","button[role='option']"];for(const s of optSels){const el=listbox.querySelector(s);if(el){el.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});el.click();await sleep(800);return{clicked:s};}}const first=listbox.querySelector('button, li, [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])');if(first){first.click();await sleep(800);return{clicked:'first_interactive'};}return{error:'no_option'};})()

steps.name: Select San Francisco from suggestions (robust: triggers React input, waits for listbox, clicks first option)

inputs.script: (() => { const today = new Date(); const checkIn = new Date(today); checkIn.setDate(today.getDate() + 7); const checkOut = new Date(checkIn); checkOut.setDate(checkIn.getDate() + 3); window.__airbnb_dates = { checkIn: checkIn.toISOString().split('T')[0], checkOut: checkOut.toISOString().split('T')[0], checkInFormatted: checkIn.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' }), checkOutFormatted: checkOut.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' }) }; return window.__airbnb_dates; })()

(()=>{const sels=["[data-testid='structured-search-input-field-split-dates-0']","[data-testid='structured-search-input-field-dates-0']","[data-testid^='structured-search-input-field-split-dates-']","[data-testid^='structured-search-input-field-dates-']","[data-testid='little-search-anytime']","button[aria-label*='Check in']","button[aria-label*='Add dates']","button[aria-label*='dates']"];for(const s of sels){const el=document.querySelector(s);if(el){el.click();return{clicked:s};}}return{clicked:null,note:'dates field not found; calendar may already be open'};})()

steps.name: Click on check-in date field (best-effort across Airbnb DOM variants)

inputs.script: (() => { const checkInDate = window.__airbnb_dates.checkIn; const dateElements = document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid*="calendar-day"]'); for (const el of dateElements) { if (el.getAttribute('data-testid').includes(checkInDate)) { el.click(); return true; } } return false; })()

steps.name: Select check-in date (7 days from now)
Wait for check-out date to be selectable

inputs.script: (() => { const checkOutDate = window.__airbnb_dates.checkOut; const dateElements = document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid*="calendar-day"]'); for (const el of dateElements) { if (el.getAttribute('data-testid').includes(checkOutDate)) { el.click(); return true; } } return false; })()

steps.name: Select check-out date (3 days after check-in)

inputs.script: (async()=>{const sleep=(ms)=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const tryClick=(sels)=>{for(const s of sels){const el=document.querySelector(s);if(el){el.click();return s;}}return null;};const guests=tryClick(["[data-testid='structured-search-input-field-guests-button']","[data-testid='structured-search-input-field-guests-0']","[data-testid='little-search-guests']","button[aria-label*='guest' i]"]);if(!guests)return{error:'guests_button_not_found'};await sleep(700);const adults=tryClick(["[data-testid='stepper-adults-increase-button']","[data-testid^='stepper-adults-increase']","button[aria-label*='increase Adults' i]","button[aria-label*='Add one adult' i]"]);if(adults)await sleep(300);const children=tryClick(["[data-testid='stepper-children-increase-button']","[data-testid^='stepper-children-increase']","button[aria-label*='increase Children' i]","button[aria-label*='Add one child' i]"]);if(children)await sleep(300);const search=tryClick(["[data-testid='structured-search-input-search-button']","button[aria-label*='Search' i][type='submit']","button[aria-label='Search']","button[data-testid='search-button']"]);return{ok:!!search,guests,adults,children,search:search||null};})()

steps.name: Configure guests + click search. Returns immediately after clicking — page navigates, so do not sleep here.
Wait for search results SPA navigation
Dismiss 'all fees included' / 'Got it' interstitial that Airbnb shows post-search

inputs.script: (() => { const listings = []; const cards = document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="card-container"]'); const maxListings = Math.min(5, cards.length); for (let i = 0; i < maxListings; i++) { const card = cards[i]; const titleEl = card.querySelector('[data-testid="listing-card-title"]'); const priceEl = card.querySelector('span._tyxjp1') || card.querySelector('span._11jcbg2') || card.querySelector('[data-testid="price-availability-row"] span'); const ratingEl = card.querySelector('[aria-label*="rating"]') || card.querySelector('span.r4a59j5'); const typeEl = card.querySelector('[data-testid="listing-card-subtitle"] > span:first-child') || card.querySelector('[data-testid="listing-card-name"]'); const imageEl = card.querySelector('img[data-original-uri]') || card.querySelector('img'); const linkEl = card.querySelector('a[href*="/rooms/"]'); listings.push({ position: i + 1, title: titleEl ? titleEl.textContent.trim() : 'N/A', price: priceEl ? priceEl.textContent.trim() : 'N/A', rating: ratingEl ? ratingEl.textContent.trim() : 'No rating', type: typeEl ? typeEl.textContent.trim() : 'N/A', image: imageEl ? imageEl.src : null, url: linkEl ? linkEl.href : null }); } const dates = window.__airbnb_dates || {}; const result = { timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), checkIn: dates.checkInFormatted || null, checkOut: dates.checkOutFormatted || null, location: 'San Francisco', guests: { adults: 2, children: 1 }, filters: { type: 'Entire place', priceRange: '$100-$300' }, listings: listings }; try { sessionStorage.setItem('__rzn_airbnb_search', JSON.stringify(result)); } catch (_e) {} try { window.name = JSON.stringify({ __rzn_airbnb_search: result }); } catch (_e) {} return result; })()

steps.name: Navigate to first property (in-tab) — Airbnb cards open new tab on click, so override via location.assign
Dismiss any login / save-listing pop-up on property page
Wait for property page to load (resilient across Airbnb PDP variants)

inputs.script: (() => { const propertyName = document.querySelector('[data-section-id="TITLE_DEFAULT"] h1')?.textContent?.trim() || document.querySelector('h1')?.textContent?.trim() || 'N/A'; const hostName = document.querySelector('[data-section-id="HOST_PROFILE_DEFAULT"] h2')?.textContent?.trim() || document.querySelector('[data-section-id="HOST_OVERVIEW_DEFAULT"] h2')?.textContent?.trim() || 'N/A'; const amenitiesSection = document.querySelector('[data-section-id="AMENITIES_DEFAULT"]'); const amenities = amenitiesSection ? Array.from(amenitiesSection.querySelectorAll('[id^="pdp_v3_"]')).map(el => el.textContent.trim()).filter(text => text && !text.includes('Show all')) : []; const descriptionEl = document.querySelector('[data-section-id="DESCRIPTION_DEFAULT"] span'); const description = descriptionEl ? descriptionEl.textContent.trim() : 'N/A'; const overviewSection = document.querySelector('[data-section-id="OVERVIEW_DEFAULT_V2"], [data-section-id="OVERVIEW_DEFAULT"]'); const overviewItems = overviewSection ? Array.from(overviewSection.querySelectorAll('li')).map(el => el.textContent.trim()).filter(Boolean) : []; const bedroomsEl = document.querySelector('[data-section-id="OVERVIEW_DEFAULT"] ol li:nth-child(2)'); const bedrooms = bedroomsEl ? bedroomsEl.textContent.trim() : (overviewItems[1] || 'N/A'); const reviewsEl = document.querySelector('[data-section-id="REVIEWS_DEFAULT"] h2'); const reviews = reviewsEl ? reviewsEl.textContent.trim() : 'No reviews'; const details = { propertyName: propertyName, url: location.href, host: hostName, bedrooms: bedrooms, overview: overviewItems.slice(0, 8), amenities: amenities.slice(0, 10), description: description.substring(0, 500) + (description.length > 500 ? '...' : ''), reviews: reviews }; try { sessionStorage.setItem('__rzn_airbnb_property', JSON.stringify(details)); } catch (_e) {} try { let stash = {}; try { stash = JSON.parse(window.name) || {}; } catch (_e2) {} if (typeof stash !== 'object' || stash === null) stash = {}; stash.__rzn_airbnb_property = details; window.name = JSON.stringify(stash); } catch (_e) {} return details; })()

steps.name: Scroll to availability calendar (best-effort; no-op if section absent)

inputs.script: return (()=>{const sels=["[data-section-id='AVAILABILITY_CALENDAR_INLINE']","[data-section-id='AVAILABILITY_CALENDAR_DEFAULT']","[data-section-id^='AVAILABILITY_CALENDAR']","[data-testid='inline-availability-calendar']"];let calendarSection=null;for(const s of sels){const el=document.querySelector(s);if(el){calendarSection=el;break;}}const dates=window.__airbnb_dates||{};let calendar;if(!calendarSection){calendar={calendarFound:false,checkInDate:dates.checkInFormatted||null,checkOutDate:dates.checkOutFormatted||null};}else{const availableDates=calendarSection.querySelectorAll("[data-is-day-blocked='false']").length;const blockedDates=calendarSection.querySelectorAll("[data-is-day-blocked='true']").length;calendar={calendarFound:true,availableDates,blockedDates,checkInDate:dates.checkInFormatted||null,checkOutDate:dates.checkOutFormatted||null};}let stash={};try{stash=JSON.parse(window.name)||{};}catch(_e){}if(typeof stash!=='object'||stash===null)stash={};let search=stash.__rzn_airbnb_search||null;let property=stash.__rzn_airbnb_property||null;if(!search){try{const raw=sessionStorage.getItem('__rzn_airbnb_search');if(raw)search=JSON.parse(raw);}catch(_e){}}if(!property){try{const raw=sessionStorage.getItem('__rzn_airbnb_property');if(raw)property=JSON.parse(raw);}catch(_e){}}const out={search_meta:search?{location:search.location,checkIn:search.checkIn,checkOut:search.checkOut,guests:search.guests,filters:search.filters,timestamp:search.timestamp}:null,listings:search&&Array.isArray(search.listings)?search.listings:[],first_listing:{details:property,calendar:calendar,url:location.href}};try{window.name='';}catch(_e){}try{sessionStorage.removeItem('__rzn_airbnb_search');sessionStorage.removeItem('__rzn_airbnb_property');}catch(_e){}return out;})()

steps.name: Check availability in calendar (resilient across AVAILABILITY_CALENDAR_* section variants)

help.summary: Run a scripted Airbnb property search in San Francisco and extract listings + first-property details.

examples.description: Run the canned San Francisco search end-to-end.

returns: Object with shape { search_meta, listings: [...], first_listing: { details, calendar, url } }. `listings` contains up to 5 SF result cards; `first_listing.details` is the PDP overview/host/amenities; `first_listing.calendar` is { calendarFound, availableDates, blockedDates, checkInDate, checkOutDate }. Listings + property details are stashed via window.name (survives in-tab navigation, including airbnb.com -> regional redirect) and re-read on the property page so the single final-step output can include them.
notes: All search inputs are hard-coded inside the steps (location, dates, price band, guest counts). To parameterize, fork or replace the workflow.
Read-only: walks the SPA, opens a property tab, then closes it. No login required.
Selectors track Airbnb's data-testid attributes; expect breakage when Airbnb ships a UI refresh.
